hero.name: Drasti P.
hero.positioning: Product Designer working on enterprise systems, workflow-heavy products, and operational tooling.

projects.title: IR Dashboard
projects.system: Incident response dashboard for tracking cases, timelines, and team workload.
projects.role: Designed the information architecture, dashboard layouts, and interaction patterns; produced high-fidelity screens and specs for engineers.

projects.title: IR Planner
projects.system: Planning tool for scheduling, assigning, and tracking investigation tasks across teams.
projects.role: Designed task flows, calendar and assignment UI, and prototypes used by engineers for implementation.

projects.title: Zighra
projects.system: Fraud-detection integration adding behavioral signals to authentication flows.
projects.role: Designed integration screens and onboarding flows for customer engineers.

projects.title: Proto3000
projects.system: Clickable prototypes for testing interaction patterns and micro-interactions.
projects.role: Built prototypes and validated UI details with product and engineering stakeholders.
